title: Vanilla-'s Vanilla PLUS
body:
It's our take on the Vanilla- scene, and our attempt at differentiating outselves from other Vanilla- Modpacks out there. We do this by improving the game, not through just QOL mods, but also changing and adding in fundamentals.
Forge 1.21.1

The purpose is keep it as heavy as possible whilst also keeping the playability and reliability of a vanilla game.

:

Notable Features include:

Exposure
GeckoLib
Create
Create Aeronautics
Le Fishe Exotique Au Chocolat
Critters and Companions
Supplimentaries
Macaws Suite
Shaders
Backports
Tons of furniture mods
Custom recipes/Automation
Custom homepage
Secrets and so much more
:

Designed for Multiplayer play.
